description: Optional public, coarse presence signal for a Pulse room.

main.description: A coarse user-owned presence signal. This record is public and must not include IP addresses, device identifiers, WebRTC credentials, or exact private audience data.

room.description: Strong reference to an app.pulse.room record.

createdAt.description: Record creation time in RFC 3339 format.

expiresAt.description: Time after which indexers should ignore this presence signal.
